## Card Benefits and Features
### Exclusive Benefits
  * 3 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent.
  * 50% more Reward Points on dining and grocery expenses


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Milestone Benefits
  * On crossing spends of ₹75,000 in 6 months, get a Gift Voucher worth ₹1,000.
  * Get up to 2 vouchers in a year.
  * Redeem 100 Reward Points as ₹20 cashback against your Credit Card's outstanding amount.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/solitaire-credit-card "View More")
![Solitaire Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Added Delights
  * Enjoy 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions ₹400-₹5,000. Max waiver: ₹250 per statement cycle.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app for over 200+ brands with Payzapp


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/solitaire-credit-card "View More")
![Solitaire Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Management and Controls
  2. ### Fees and Charges
  3. ### More Rewards with PayZapp
  4. ### Credit and Safety
  5. ### Important Terms and Conditions


###  Card Management and Controls 
  * **Single Interface  
**One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, Fastag and Consumer Durable Loans
  * **Spends tracking  
**Simple interface to track all your spends
  * **Reward Points  
**View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management and Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees and Charges 
Solitaire Credit Card Fees & Charges
  * _Annual charges:_ ₹500 plus GST annually.
  * **Membership fee waiver** for next year on spending ₹50,000 within a year.
  * **Interest:** 3.49% interest charged to any unpaid balance remaining beyond the bill's due date.


Effective September 1, 2020, a monthly interest rate of 3.6% (equivalent to an annual rate of 43.2%) will be applied to any outstanding balance carried beyond the bill's due date.
Read detailed fees and charges
Terms and Conditions apply
[Check Now](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/solitaire-credit-card/fees-and-charges)
![Fees and Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  More Rewards with PayZapp 
  * Link your HDFC Bank Solitaire Credit Card on PayZapp
  * Earn additional CashBack along with the card Reward Points on utility bills, mobile recharges and more.
  * Get ₹1,000 CashBack on shopping in-app for over 200+ brands.
  * Securely pay without the hassle of OTPs with ‘Swipe to Pay’


![More Rewards with PayZapp](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Credit and Safety 
  * Revolving Credit is available at a nominal interest rate (Check the [fees and charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/solitaire-credit-card/fees-and-charges) section for more details).
  * Get up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase.
  * The offer is subject to the submission of the charge by the merchant.
  * Stay protected against unauthorised use when you shop anywhere with EMV Chip Card technology.


![Credit and Safety](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What are the benefits of the Solitaire Credit Card?
The benefits of the Solitaire Credit Card include reward points on every purchase, ​​CashBack options, dining and grocery rewards, fuel surcharge waiver, comprehensive insurance protection, lounge access, golf privileges, and more.
###  What is the Solitaire Credit Card?
The **_Solitaire Credit Card_** is a premium ​ ​Credit Card offered by HDFC Bank. It provides exclusive **_rewards_** , **_personal finance_** , ​C​ashBack options, and offers, along with a host of other benefits and features.
###  How to use the Solitaire Credit Card?
To use an HDFC Bank Solitaire Credit Card, simply swipe or insert the card at the payment terminal when making a purchase. You can also use it for online transactions by entering the card details. Earn reward points on every transaction, which can be redeemed for shopping vouchers, airline tickets, and more.
###  Is the Solitaire Credit Card free?
No, the Solitaire Credit Card incurs an annual fee of ₹500 + GST. However, if you spend ₹50,000 in a year, you can get a waiver of next year's annual membership fee.
###  How to apply for a Solitaire Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Solitaire Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
